title: stelis langlassei
intro: Stelis langlassei, also known as the Langlasse's Stelis, is a type of orchid species that belongs to the Stelis genus. Traditionally, Stelis langlassei has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant are said to include aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as providing relief from fever and sore throats. Stelis langlassei can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic use.
